reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: dirty n ass
reviews.negatives: the workers

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had low expectations but was pleasantly surprised. I think this is the nicest Hampton in. I’ve ever seen. Really nice actuallly. Like in the next category up of hotels. Very clean and new.

reviews.title: Some things you can't control
reviews.text: Everything about the hotel was excellent. The staff was beyond helpful and friendly. The place was very clean and quiet. Convenient location to the airport and all the small villages nearby. If I had to find something I wish was different, it would be the other guests. The morning breakfast buffet was like a mosh pit at times, you had to muscle your way through to get almost everything BUT there was a little league tournament or something going on and the parents were hoarding plates full of food. One morning there was a woman and her teenage daughter totally taking over both waffle machines to the point that no one else could get a waffle. They only left after completely emptying the batter container.  It's sad how some people have zero respect for others. I don't feel like the employees should have to be a security bouncer over a waffle machine so this in no way reflects on them!

reviews.title: Aweful
reviews.positives: Breakfast was really good. Room for breakfast was nice. The bed was comfy. We didn’t have any TV, you had To go through hoops for Wi-Fi, the heat wasn’t working but finally got someone to come to room to fix it, guy at the desk was so frazzled with all the guests checking in and issues he wouldn’t answer the phone if you called the front desk so every issue we had I had to go down to get help, annoying. My husband has a slight disability and the bathtub was hard getting in and out and he felt unsafe with only one grab bar and it was on the back wall and nothing in the front to hold onto to get in and out. Very unsafe even for someone without a disability. The last thing about the room was the bag of dog food in the closet. You could smell it in the room and bathroom. The topper of the stay was the receipt I received to PARK in the parking lot!! ARE YOU KIDDING ME? $15 plus tax. People find another place to stay. NEVER AGAIN!

reviews.title: Hotel para quedarse sólo a dormir
reviews.text: Fue muy conveniente. Estábamos visitando a la familia y el hotel nos quedo muy cerca . Llegábamos a dormir
reviews.positives: Es cómodo y céntrico

reviews.title: Decent..
reviews.positives: I like the price and that it’s near our family to visit.
reviews.negatives: The hotel has become very ghetto.. honestly.. this hotel use to be really nice. The pools always has something going on.. there were kids with blown up diapers in the water.. and someone else’s kid was throwing Doritos in the pool! So disgusting.. and there is never anyone that pops in and out to check it out. The last time I was there, there were kids throwing chairs in the pool. Lastly, the fact that you’re charged for parking is absurd! I’ve NEVER before seen this..

reviews.title: Empfehlenswert
reviews.text:
Bei der Suche nach Hotels auf Long island ist das Hampton Inn schon eine Alternative! Freundlicher Empfang. Schönes großes Zimmer mit Kühlschrank und Mikrowelle!
In der Nähe gibt es viele Restaurants. Gutes Frühstück!

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.positives: Gym
reviews.negatives: Needs updating, carpets equipment, etc

reviews.title: uncomfortable
reviews.positives: the beds and pillows were very uncomfortable in both rooms our families stayed in.  The heating system was very noisy in both rooms.  And the walls are so thin you heard everything in the surrounding rooms and hallways.  We ate breakfast at your recommended hotel dining and the food and service  were not worth $100.  The wait staff was not well versed in English which made it hard to communicate and were not attentive to our needs.  I was able to get a food refund from your front staff but they would not credit me any points or monies for the uncomfortable stay.  Not very satisfied for the price we paid.
reviews.negatives: new beds, new pillows, upgrade restaurant staff and add divider to restaurant area so it feels more like a restaurant then a lobby eating area. add insulation to the walls

reviews.title: Well below that of other hotels, and I've never paid for parking at any hotel.
reviews.positives: Room clean, except carpet.
reviews.negatives: Had to pay for on premise parking first time ever. Room ergonomics don’t work well. Room service is every 2 days. And bathroom was not setup for number of people on reservation. One women working check out on a Sunday, took longer than normal.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Conveniently located to where we wanted to be
reviews.negatives: Trash left on the curb for days and days. Dog feces in the grass that I stepped in moldy fruit. When I opened it an orange it was moldy on the inside

reviews.title: 🚿 access bar was rusted off. Almost got hurt.aged
reviews.positives: Well prepared. Large selection of items.
reviews.negatives: Coffee access not long enough.

reviews.title: For the price it’s not worth it
reviews.positives: It was a bed. Good location
reviews.negatives: We were given an adjoining room and the other people were fighting all night and we could hear every word. Got no sleep

reviews.title: It was a stay. The only thing I enjoyed this stay is the free breakfast
reviews.positives: That it’s close to my moms house
reviews.negatives: The fact that your policies changed and your entire staff isn’t up to date. The down payment process changed. I stayed twice in the last 2 weeks. The first stay was usual they took my credit card, held only a $100 and nothing else and released and charged the rest which was just for parking when I left. This is normal. Then the second time I stayed the person was trying to charge me $200 down payment and the hold for the room. I asked them why the amount was so much and they said it’s $100 deposit a night and they hold the amount for the room as well. I said you guys don’t do this why are you doing this and the guy Ray said they’ve always done this. First off, no they don’t and second I found out that Ray has only been there for a year so how come he wasn’t told it’s only been for about a year that these policies have changed and why didn’t the first visit happen like this as well??? Plus what really doesn’t make sense is the hotel is no holding up to $300 for deposit and the amount for the room?? Why?? If you’ve taken the amount for the room and you have my credit card that why the deposit?? It doesn’t make sense. If after my stay when you’re supposed to charge me because that’s the way I set up the hotel room basically everytime, you have my credit card already. That’s the whole point of holding my credit card isn’t it?? Just in case stuff happens to the room. So that extra down payment is irrelevant. I usually stay a week about once a year and have been doing it for over a decade. Now this has changed and you’re telling me that not only do I need to have the over a thousand dollars for the room but also $300 extra on my card just for them to hold. THATS RIDICULOUS!! And I will not be doing that. So unfortunately because of this stupid change I will no longer be giving this Hampton inn my business and neither will my family. My mother had her wedding there also. So things very sad!

reviews.title: Will not be staying there again.
reviews.positives: Average
reviews.negatives: Worn carpets in hallway. Having to pay for parking with no visible security.

reviews.title: It was adequate.
reviews.positives: The breakfast room was clean and well supplied. The bed was comfortable. The gym was very nice!
reviews.negatives: The carpeting in the entire place was disgusting. There was an extra daily cost to park our car on the premises!

reviews.title: Beware do not come to this hotel. It also reeked of Marijuana
reviews.positives: breakfast was good
reviews.negatives: toilet bowl in room overflowed twice.  I needed to call front desk so they can plunge it. The pillows are  horrible . They are much too soft no matter how you adjust them your head and neck becomes totally misaligned.  Requested housekeeping due to the flood in bathroom.  They never washed the floor nor counter or sink just replaced the towels that I had to use to absorb the flood.  They have some hoodspa to charge for parking which I wasn't told. I stayed at this hotel in September and did not get charged.  I don't recommend this hotel. There are no hygienic protocols.

reviews.title: Just ok
reviews.positives: The location was great. Just what I looked for
reviews.negatives: The refrigerator didn’t work. The toilet didn’t flush when we arrived and had a maintenance call. The unexpected $15 charge per night for parking.

reviews.title: It was ok. More expensive.

reviews.negatives:
Didn't clean room each night 
Didn't let us know about parking charge

reviews.title: Will not return .
reviews.negatives: Noticed after we left that were were charged for parking . No one ever mentioned this and it was not disclosed anywhere .  Breakfast was not your typical Hampton inn breakfast.  Did not meet tie normal standards others have  at Hampton inns.

reviews.title: Will not be staying agaib.
reviews.positives: It was in a great location.
reviews.negatives: Jet Tub was absolutely disgusting. Shooting out brown water at first then followed by clumps of black mold. Complained to the front desk, who then claimed we were lying about having a jet tub in our room and that he was “only aware of one single room with a jet tub” i showed him photos of the tub, he moved our room and the new tub in the other room was exactly the same way. There were animal stains on the bedding. Paying almost 700 for 2 nights for a king suite and it was gross.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The pool area
reviews.negatives: Tv didn’t work—wouldn’t connect to apps. Too many people at the pool. Didn’t get back my full deposit after my stay.

reviews.title: Mediocre
reviews.positives: Love the cleanliness and staff were incredibly friendly.  I love that there were snack options, and free coffee!  The beds are very comfortable as well.
reviews.negatives: My TV had no service my second night as well as no WiFi. I messaged about this on the app for help and never got a response. There were also drunk teenagers running around the parking lot, lobby, and halls. They were running up and down our floor halls around 1am one night. Having a 5 month old baby this was a bit of an annoyance. This was my third stay here within the last two years.  The first two stays were great but this current stay was off putting and I was disappointed because it is not a cheap place to stay.

reviews.title: First times were good but last two times not good.
reviews.positives: We liked the free breakfasts and the location.
reviews.negatives:
We’ve stayed a lot but last two times house keeping was bad with no toilet paper, shower mats.  Once the sheets looked slept in and they were annoyed to give us clean ones.

Desk staff was very good.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: missed breakfast they cleaned up before 10AM. also our sheets for our bed were stained and dirty.
reviews.negatives: the cost for the room to look the way it did unacceptable

reviews.title: Average
reviews.positives: There were amenities that were decent
reviews.negatives: I did not like the fact that I was charged for parking . That is outrageous, I book the hotel cause it was a decent price but then get hit with 37.00 in parking fees . Why not just include it in the price of the room. How do they expect people to get to the hotel you need a car . It’s just ridiculous that you should have to pay for parking a you are patronizing their hotel . Will never go there again

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: They charged a 12.00 parking fee and never told me l think it is crazy to charge you to park when you stay at their hotel

reviews.title: Comfy bed... great night of sleep
reviews.positives: Breakfast good... shower nice and bed very comfy
reviews.negatives: Very limited dairy free options and nobody knew what items had dairy or not... no labeling of the food.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location was perfect for us.
reviews.negatives: Every other day cleaning (we asked first next day and it was denied), we needed clean towels and our bed done after a long day of work.. but we didn’t have it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: One elevator was not working, so we had to wait a long time for the elevator.

reviews.title: Great short stay with great amenities and friendly staff
reviews.positives:
I can't say enough good things about this place! The room was exceptionally clean (and whatever cleaners they use don't overpower the room). I had a nice view of the little pond out front, and the bed was very comfortable. There were so many plugs and USB ports in the room, which was great.

The pool's temperature was absolutely perfect, and the sun room it's in made a sunny April day feel like mid-summer. The gazebo outside was also nice. I also enjoyed the fitness center - they have more equipment than most, with a lot of extras like yoga mats and kettlebells. The game room was small but looked cool - I never got a chance to play, though. I also appreciate the HOURS of the amenities. Everything is open from 530-11 and as an early riser, I love that. 

Breakfast was regular Hilton fare and adequate. The no-fee Grubhub was a big plus during my stay since there's no onsite restaurant and I came from the train.

The staff was also exceptional, and let me have early check-in and late check-out. I was travelling for work and had odd hours, so having that extra time was really great. If I'm ever back in ronkonkoma for work ,I would stay again!
reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect, really. The only thing I would add would be a smart TV - I'm not really that much into cable. I wish more hotels would switch!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: loved it kids had fun in pool n we were not far from the funeral we had to be there for. An 5 mins away from our step son for his mother that passed..

reviews.title: no complaints
reviews.positives: everything was good
reviews.negatives: comfortable bed and room

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Bed  and shower were great.
reviews.negatives: There was no gluten free breakfast, my room had a ripped curtain hanging and the outlets for charging were not great. I had to spend money on a charger and plug.

reviews.title: Great location, breakfast, staff and rooms all good!
reviews.positives: Good location, reasonably priced.
